subject: Cannot login to account
description: I have been trying to login but keep getting password errors. I reset it twice already but still cannot access my account.

subject: Payment failed on checkout
description: My credit card payment keeps failing during checkout. I have tried 3 different cards. The error says transaction declined.

subject: App crashes on startup
description: The mobile app crashes immediately after the loading screen on my iPhone 14. This started happening after the latest update.

subject: Feature request: dark mode
description: Would love to have a dark mode option in the app settings. My eyes get tired after long sessions.

subject: Invoice not received for last month
description: I was charged on March 1st but never received an invoice via email. I need it for my expense report which is due this week.

subject: Two-factor authentication broken
description: The 2FA code SMS is not being delivered to my phone. I have been locked out for 2 days.

subject: Bug: sorting not working
description: When I sort the data table by date column it appears to sort alphabetically instead of chronologically.

subject: Refund request for duplicate charge
description: I was charged twice for the same subscription on February 28th. Both charges appear on my credit card statement.

subject: Export to PDF not generating
description: When I click Export > PDF nothing happens. No download starts and no error message appears.

subject: Account suspension without notice
description: My account was suspended without any email notification. I have an active paid subscription and all payments are up to date.

subject: Suggestion: bulk export feature
description: It would be great to have a bulk export option to download multiple records at once instead of one by one.

subject: Critical security vulnerability found
description: I discovered a SQL injection vulnerability in the search endpoint. I am reporting this responsibly.

subject: Slow loading times on dashboard
description: The main dashboard takes over 30 seconds to load. I have a fast internet connection and it only happens on your app.

subject: Cannot update billing information
description: When I try to update my credit card information I get an error 500 after submitting the form.

subject: Password reset email not arriving
description: I requested a password reset 3 times today and have not received any email. I checked spam folder also.

subject: Feature request: API rate limiting info
description: As a developer integrating with your API I need visibility into my current rate limit usage.

subject: Wrong data in monthly report
description: The monthly usage report for February shows incorrect totals. The numbers are roughly 50 percent higher than actual usage.

subject: Account locked after wrong password
description: I entered my password incorrectly 3 times and now my account is locked. I know the correct password now.

subject: Subscription upgrade not applied
description: I upgraded from Basic to Pro plan yesterday and was charged but my account still shows Basic features.

subject: Mobile app notification issues
description: Push notifications stopped working on my Android phone after last update. I have notifications enabled in settings.

subject: Improvement: keyboard shortcuts
description: Adding keyboard shortcuts for common actions like create and save would greatly improve efficiency for power users.

subject: Production database error
description: Our environment is throwing database connection errors affecting all customers since 3am UTC.

subject: Incorrect subscription renewal date
description: My subscription renewal is showing November 15th but I signed up on October 1st. Please correct the billing cycle.

subject: Cannot download attachment
description: When I click on email attachments in your system they do not download. Tried Chrome and Firefox.

subject: Account data missing after migration
description: After your system migration last week all my historical data from before 2023 is gone. I need these records.

subject: Billing address update needed
description: I moved offices and need to update the billing address on my account for tax and invoice purposes.

subject: Login redirect loop
description: After entering valid credentials the system redirects me back to the login page. Cleared cookies and cache but issue persists.

subject: Calculation bug in analytics
description: The conversion rate calculation appears wrong. It shows 150 percent conversion which is mathematically impossible.

subject: Request: CSV export with custom columns
description: Please add ability to select which columns to include in CSV export. Currently all columns are exported.

subject: Urgent: payment processing down
description: All payment processing is failing since 10:00 AM EST. We are losing sales as customers cannot checkout.

subject: Search functionality broken
description: The search bar returns no results for any query. I know the records exist because I can browse to them manually.

subject: Wrong currency displayed
description: My account is in USD but all prices are displaying in EUR. I did not change any settings.

subject: Request: webhook notifications
description: We would like webhook support for ticket status changes so we can integrate with our internal systems.

subject: Cannot cancel subscription
description: I want to cancel my subscription but cannot find the cancel button anywhere in account settings.

subject: File upload size limit too low
description: The 5MB file upload limit is too restrictive for our workflow. We regularly need to upload larger files.

subject: Duplicate email notifications
description: I am receiving every notification email twice. Both emails are identical and arrive at the same time.

subject: API authentication token expired
description: Our integration stopped working because the API token expired. The documentation says tokens are valid indefinitely.

subject: Incorrect tax calculation on invoice
description: The tax on our latest invoice is calculated at 25 percent but our region has 20 percent VAT.

subject: Session timeout too aggressive
description: The system logs me out after 5 minutes of inactivity. I frequently read documentation while working and lose my session.

subject: Cannot access admin panel
description: I am an admin user but get 403 Forbidden when accessing the admin panel. My role in the system shows Admin.

subject: Data export shows wrong date format
description: CSV exports use US date format MM/DD/YYYY but we need ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD for our data processing.

subject: Critical: data breach suspected
description: We noticed unauthorized access to our account from an IP address in a foreign country. Please investigate.

subject: Slow API response times
description: API endpoints are responding in 8-10 seconds instead of usual 200ms. This is causing timeouts in our application.

subject: Billing cycle change request
description: We want to switch from monthly to annual billing to get the discount. How do we change the billing cycle.

subject: Bug in permission inheritance
description: When I create a sub-folder and set permissions the parent folder permissions are not inherited correctly.

subject: Integration with Slack requested
description: Please add Slack integration to receive ticket notifications and be able to create tickets directly from Slack.

subject: Error when importing large files
description: When importing CSV files over 10MB the import fails with a generic error message after waiting 5 minutes.

subject: Overcharged for cancelled users
description: I cancelled 3 user licenses last month but was still charged for them on the next invoice.

subject: Keyboard navigation broken
description: Cannot navigate the application using keyboard only. Tab order is incorrect and many interactive elements are not reachable.

subject: Response time SLA not met
description: Your support SLA guarantees 4 hour response time for critical issues. I submitted a critical ticket 8 hours ago.
